offPlanPropertiesTitle: DAMAC Hills - Trump Estates Beverly Hills Drive
offplanDescription: Beverly Hills Drive at the Trump Estates is the epitome of California living. It is located within the Trump International Golf Club and offers a truly unique lifestyle that is steeped in nature, the great outdoors, and the essence of luxury. Enjoy opulence as far as the eye can see, with scenic vistas in every direction. Views of lakes, soft rolling green hills, breathtaking sunsets, and more are available.
developerSummary: DAMAC Properties has been at the forefront of the Middle East’s luxury real estate market since 2002, delivering award-winning residential, commercial and leisure properties across the region, including the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Jordan, Lebanon, Iraq, Maldives, Canada, the US, as well as the UK.
propertyExplainer:
Beverly Hills Drive is a new private development by Damac Properties that features exclusive design 7 bedroom villas in Damac Hills, Dubai.

The development presents this as a statement rather than an address, describing the most flourishing ingredients of luxury.

Join the most amazing residences awaiting their beloved owners to decide before they get nestled, so make them align in your way.

locationDescription: From its gloriously compelling entrance to the nearby crystal-clear lake, the Trump Estates at DAMAC Hills offers a unique view into world-class living. Beverly Hills Drive is nestled within, far removed from the trappings of city life, yet surrounded by infinite splendour.
